3266660.name: The Forsaken Anthology: Obsession
3266660.description: The Forsaken Anthology: Obsession, a psychological horror game that explores the dark side of human desire and the lengths one might go to fulfill it.                                                                   A psychological horror game set within the confines of a seemingly ordinary apartment complex. When an unsuspecting neighbor makes a fateful pact with a demon, their life spirals into a nightmarish quest for desire that demands unspeakable sacrifices from those around them.                                                                                                                                                                The Forsaken Anthology: Obsession invites players to immerse themselves in a gripping narrative where exploration and cunning are key to survival. Perfect for fans of narrative-driven horror, this game beckons you to confront your deepest fears and question the very nature of obsession.
3266660.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
